message:
test(journal): add 13 edge-case tests for JBD2 replay and native COW journal

JournalRegion resolve/is_empty validation, empty region error handling,
multi-commit COW recovery, CRC corruption detection, oversized payload
rejection, journal-full NoSpace, sequence tracking, and transaction
accessors. Brings lib.rs from 25 to 38 tests (1:77 → 1:51 ratio).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
